meta_title: For Freelancers: passive income to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Passive Income to Solve 'Stuck' App Cycles
content.seo_description: Break free from basic app development. Learn how to generate passive income using Antigravity and Claude Code in this intermediate-level developer case study.
content.answer_block: Stop trading hours for dollars on basic CRUD apps. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for automated logic implementation, you can build high-value, automated micro-SaaS products. This shift from service-based delivery to productized passive income models allows you to scale revenue without increasing your development hours.
content.intro:
You’re in the 'Freelancer’s Trap': grinding out basic landing pages and simple CRUD apps for clients who nickel-and-dime your hourly rate. Your technical skills are stagnating, and your revenue is capped by the number of hours you can physically sit at your desk. The thrill of building has been replaced by the monotony of maintenance cycles.

But there is a pivot point. By automating your development workflow with Antigravity and Claude Code, you can stop being a code monkey and start being an architect. We are moving beyond client work into the realm of micro-SaaS, where your code works while you sleep. It’s time to stop building apps for others and start building assets for yourself.

steps.title: Define the Micro-SaaS Niche
steps.description: Identify a recurring pain point in your existing client base that can be solved with a standalone tool. Use Antigravity to map out the core data architecture and user flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-level schema and functional requirements document for a micro-SaaS tool that automates [insert niche, e.g., invoice reconciliation] for small business owners.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate a project roadmap and tech stack recommendation based on the Antigravity schema provided'

steps.title: Rapid Scaffolding with Antigravity
steps.description: Generate the boilerplate and infrastructure code. This eliminates the 'blank page' syndrome and sets up your environment for production-ready code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a production-ready Next.js boilerplate with Supabase integration, authentication, and a clean Tailwind CSS layout optimized for SaaS.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'unzip the generated boilerplate and initialize the git repository'

steps.title: Automating Logic with Claude Code
steps.description: Use Claude Code to write the core business logic. Focus on the 'secret sauce' that makes your product valuable, allowing the AI to handle the tedious boilerplate implementation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the server-side logic for the core feature: [insert feature, e.g., automated PDF parsing and data extraction] using Node.js and the OpenAI API.
steps.claude_code_command: claude commit 'Implement core business logic for data extraction module'

steps.title: Integrating Stripe for Passive Revenue
steps.description: Implement a subscription model that allows your users to pay automatically, transforming your code into a recurring income engine.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Stripe subscription integration module for Next.js, including webhook handlers for handling successful payments and subscription status updates.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'verify stripe integration using stripe listen and local environment variables'

steps.title: Deployment and CI/CD Automation
steps.description: Set up automated deployment so that every push to your main branch triggers a production update, ensuring your product is always live and ready for users.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a GitHub Actions workflow for automated testing and deployment to Vercel, ensuring zero-downtime deployments.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'configure continuous deployment and run initial end-to-end smoke tests'

pro_tips: Always build for the '80/20' rule: 80% of your revenue will come from 20% of the features; keep the MVP lean.
Use Claude Code to refactor your own legacy code—it can identify bottlenecks you've become 'blind' to over time.
Automate your marketing: Use your dev tools to build a 'build in public' Twitter bot that tweets your progress updates.
Prioritize 'Time-to-First-Value' (TTFV) for your users over complex UI; passive income products thrive on utility, not aesthetics.
Store your prompt library in a private repo; treat your AI prompts as intellectual property alongside your source code.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, focus on SEO-driven content marketing to drive organic traffic to your tool. Use the same AI-assisted workflow to generate blog posts that solve problems for your target audience.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools to stop trading time for money and start building a portfolio of assets. Stop waiting for the perfect client and start building the perfect product. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
